personal.preferred_title: AWS Data Engineer | Spark, Lakehouse Migration & ETL Modernization

summary: AWS Data Engineer experienced in migrating large-scale on-prem data platforms to AWS-based lakehouse architectures using Python, SQL, Spark, PySpark, S3, Glue, and Redshift. Strong background in ETL modernization, data reconciliation, telemetry-scale ingestion, and Hadoop ecosystem tools including Hive/HDFS. Hands-on experience optimizing legacy workflows, transforming large datasets, and supporting analytics-ready cloud data platforms.

experience.title: Senior Data Engineer / AWS Migration Platform Engineer - CITI
bullets: Built hybrid AWS/Oracle data platform using S3 landing zones, Glue ETL, and Redshift to support large-scale telemetry and forecasting workloads.
Developed Python/Pandas ETL pipelines ingesting telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints, replacing legacy manual processing workflows.
Migrated forecasting and analytics workloads from on-prem Oracle systems to AWS-based processing environments.
Built Spark/PySpark-based processing workflows for scalable transformation and reporting pipelines.
Optimized Parquet-based datasets and reporting structures for faster downstream analytics and query performance.
Worked with large structured telemetry datasets and reconciliation checks to validate reporting accuracy and pipeline integrity.
Containerized Python ETL jobs on EC2/ECS to support scalable batch processing workloads.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Participated in AWS migration planning and operational readiness assessments for monitoring and analytics systems.
Performed data mining and telemetry analysis to identify optimization opportunities across enterprise systems.

experience.title: CA APM Consultant
bullets: Built Perl/Ksh automation scripts for recurring data extraction, reporting, and telemetry processing.
Supported enterprise-scale telemetry and performance data environments across thousands of monitored systems.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Languages: Python, SQL, Java, Perl, Korn Shell
skills.Data Engineering: Apache Spark, PySpark, ETL/ELT, Data Pipelines, Data Reconciliation, Data Warehousing, Parquet
skills.AWS & Cloud: AWS S3, Glue, Athena, Redshift, ECS

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Built AWS-based lakehouse platform using S3, Glue, Athena, PySpark, and Parquet for scalable ETL processing and analytics-ready datasets. Optimized storage layouts and resolved small-file processing issues for large-scale reporting workloads.

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Developed an AI-driven forecasting engine with Python and PySpark, reducing cycles by 90% using Prophet and scikit-learn models for bottleneck prediction.
